documentation.text:
@title BountyEscrow
 @notice Escrow contract for issue-based bounties.
 Flow:
 1) Creator locks ERC20 funds with createBounty.
 2) Solver submits PR URL with submitSolution.
 3) Owner/relayer resolves with resolveBounty (approve/reject).
 4) Funds go to solver (approve) or creator (reject).

@title BountyEscrowNative
 @notice Escrow bounties in native OKB (msg.value).
 Flow:
 1) Creator creates bounty with issue URL and sends native OKB.
 2) Solver submits PR URL.
 3) Owner/relayer resolves approved/rejected.
 4) Payout goes to solver on approval, creator on rejection.

@title MockUSDC
 @notice Lightweight ERC20 token for local/testnet bounty escrow testing.
